parsedJson.summary: The page has a professional roofing look and visible contact actions, but the above-fold area is text-heavy and does not make the fastest path to a quote feel effortless.

issues.title: Oversized headline slows comprehension
issues.what_observed: The hero headline spans three large lines and includes a long quoted sentence: "Feel Safe Under a Roof That Lasts - Brisbane Roof Restoration with 10 Years of Worry-Free Protection!"
issues.why_problem: A local customer comparing roofers from Google has to work too hard to understand the offer quickly. The most important action, getting help or a quote, competes with a very large block of marketing text.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter headline such as "Brisbane Roof Repairs & Restoration" with one supporting line underneath, followed immediately by phone and quote buttons.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the hero into a direct service-led headline, reduce the heading size by about 20-30%, and place a clear primary CTA directly under the subheading.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一屏的标题太长太大，客户要读好几秒才知道你具体做什么。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户通常会在几秒内决定要不要继续看。标题读起来费劲，会让一部分从 Google 商家资料点进来的客户直接返回去看下一家。

issues.title: Quote CTA is visually secondary
issues.what_observed: The "GET FREE QUOTE" button is a white pill in the top-right, while the blue phone button beside it is more visually dominant.
issues.why_problem: Visitors who are not ready to call may miss the quote path because it does not stand out as the main next step. That matters for roofing customers who may want pricing before speaking to someone.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-contrast primary "Get Free Quote" button in the hero area, paired with a secondary click-to-call button, both visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move a stronger quote CTA into the main hero content, use the brand blue or another high-contrast accent for it, and keep the phone CTA next to it as a secondary action.
issues.plain_explanation: “获取免费报价”按钮放在右上角，而且没有电话按钮显眼，客户不一定第一眼看到。
issues.customer_impact: 很多屋顶维修客户会先想要报价，不一定马上打电话。如果报价入口不够明显，会减少询盘，尤其会影响从手机搜索进来的客户。

issues.title: Phone number appears incomplete
issues.what_observed: The blue phone button in the header shows "0426 366 7.." with the end of the number visually cut off or abbreviated.
issues.why_problem: An incomplete-looking phone number can immediately reduce trust. A customer with an urgent roof issue may wonder whether the site is broken or whether the business details are reliable.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The full phone number displayed clearly inside the button, with enough horizontal padding and no truncation.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Increase the phone button width, prevent text truncation, and test the full number across desktop and mobile header breakpoints.
issues.plain_explanation: 电话按钮里的号码看起来被截断了，像是网站没有做好。
issues.customer_impact: 电话是本地服务最重要的成交入口之一。号码显示不完整会直接降低信任，遇到漏水或紧急维修的客户可能马上打给竞争对手。

issues.title: Roof image is heavily darkened
issues.what_observed: The roof photo behind the hero is covered by a very dark overlay, making the actual roofing work hard to inspect.
issues.why_problem: The dark treatment helps white text stand out, but it also hides the real work quality. Roofing customers want visual proof that the company does solid, current work.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A brighter, sharper roof image with a controlled dark gradient only behind the text area, leaving part of the roof clearly visible.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the full dark overlay with a left-side gradient behind the copy and use a clearer project photo that shows roof material and workmanship.
issues.plain_explanation: 背景屋顶照片被压得太暗，客户看不清实际施工效果。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶行业很依赖“看起来靠谱”。如果客户看不到真实工程质量，就更难相信你比其他 Brisbane roofer 更值得联系。

issues.title: Too many checklist claims above fold
issues.what_observed: The hero includes nine checkmark bullet points across two columns, including long lines such as "Clear and Consistent Communication Every Step of the Way".
issues.why_problem: The long checklist makes the first screen feel busy and forces visitors to scan a lot before acting. Important trust points like licensed, insured, emergency availability, and years in business do not stand out.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Three to four compact trust badges above the fold, such as "Licensed & Insured", "Since 2004", "Emergency Roofing", and "Free Quotes".
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Condense the checklist into four short trust badges under the CTA, then move detailed service promises lower on the page with icons and supporting copy.
issues.plain_explanation: 第一屏放了太多勾选卖点，信息看起来有点挤，重点反而不突出。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不会逐条读完九个卖点。他们通常只看几个最关键的信息，比如有牌照、有保险、能不能紧急处理、多久能报价。重点不清楚会降低联系意愿。

positive_observations: Phone and quote actions are visible in the desktop header.
The page uses a real roofing background image, which fits the service category.
Trust claims such as licensed, insured, family-owned, and emergency availability are present.
redesign_priorities: 1. Fix the header phone number so it displays fully on all screen sizes.
2. Simplify the hero message and add a stronger quote CTA inside the main hero area.
3. Replace the long checklist with four high-value trust badges above the fold.
